[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011001 3
1 0010100 2
2 1010011 4
3 0100100 2
4 1111111 a
5 1111111 a
6 1111111 a
7 1111111 a

01 10 0111111 6
12 21 1011111 6
23 32 1111111 a match 4 5 6 7
34 43 1111111 a match 4 5 6 7

71 17 1011111 6
